title: Lunar Leap: Spacecraft Lands on Moon's Far Side

title: The Phone That Flipped the World
story: Snap! In 1996, a new gadget made jaws drop. The Motorola StarTAC burst onto the scene on January 3, becoming the first successful flip phone. This sleek device folded in half like a clamshell, making it super portable. People went wild for its compact design and cool features. The StarTAC was a massive hit, with millions sold around the globe.
activity_question: What type of design did the Motorola StarTAC have?
follow_up_question: How do you think phones might change in the future?

title: A Texan Pioneer's Big Dream
story: Stephen F. Austin had a bold vision for Texas. On January 3, 1823, he received a huge gift: the Mexican government granted him land in Texas. Austin wasn't keeping it all for himself, though. He planned to bring hundreds of families to settle this wild frontier, starting a new chapter in Texas history.
activity_question: What did Stephen F. Austin receive from the Mexican government?
activity_choices: A grant of land in Texas
activity_answer: A grant of land in Texas
follow_up_question: Why do you think Austin wanted to bring families to settle in Texas?
